function.name: calculate_date_difference
function.description: Calculate the difference in days between two dates.
function.long_description: Parses two dates and returns the signed day difference and absolute day difference.

date1.description: First date as string (default format: YYYY-MM-DD)

date2.description: Second date as string (default format: YYYY-MM-DD)

example_user_queries: find the day difference between 2026-01-01 and 2026-12-31.
Call calculate_date_difference with date1 01/04/2026 and date2 15/04/2026 using %d/%m/%Y.
Calculate the number of days between 2023-01-01 and 2023-12-31.
Determine the day gap between 2024-05-10 and 2024-06-10.
How many days are between 2026-01-01 and 2026-01-31?
